scope_filter.title: Scope Filter
scope_filter.help_text: Filter inferences by scope attributes like population, condition, dosage, etc. Only relations matching all filter criteria will be included in the inference.

notifications.network_error: Network error. Please check your connection.
notifications.session_expired: Your session has expired. Please log in again.
notifications.unauthorized: You do not have permission to perform this action.
notifications.server_error: Server error. Please try again later.
notifications.http_403: You don't have permission to perform this action.
notifications.http_404: The requested resource was not found.
notifications.rate_limit: Too many requests. Please try again later.

search.title: Search
search.match_score_title: Text match strength — not a confidence or quality indicator
search.empty_state: Enter a search term to find entities, publications, and evidence claims.

import.upload_description: Import entities in bulk from a CSV or JSON file. Maximum 500 rows.
import.csv_hint: CSV must have a header row with columns:
import.json_hint: JSON must be an array of objects with keys:

source_import.upload_description: Import sources in bulk from a BibTeX, RIS, or JSON file. Maximum 500 entries.
source_import.ris_hint: RIS format with TY, TI, AU, PY, ER tags.
source_import.json_hint: JSON array with title, kind, authors, year, url, origin fields.

entity.delete_confirm_message: Are you sure you want to delete this entity? This action cannot be undone.

create_entity.title: Create Entity
create_entity.description: Create a new entity in the knowledge graph. The slug is a unique identifier for this entity.
create_entity.identity_description: Define the canonical identifier and category for this entity. Prefer an international or English term for the slug.
create_entity.filter_options_error: Failed to load entity category options
create_entity.lookup_required: Enter a term to search first.
create_entity.ai_prefill_error: AI prefill failed. Check that the API key is configured, then try again.
create_entity.slug_format: Slug must be 3-100 lowercase letters, digits, or hyphens, starting with a letter
create_entity.alias_save_error: Entity created, but failed to save aliases.
create_entity.lookup_description: Search existing entity slugs and terms first. If nothing matches, prefill the form from the term.
create_entity.lookup_existing_found: Possible existing entities found. Open the existing entity instead of creating a duplicate.
create_entity.lookup_no_match: No existing entity found for this term. Choose a prefill option, then review before creating.
create_entity.category_help: Optional: Select a category to help organize this entity
create_entity.display_name_help: Optional. Set the preferred human-facing name for this entity.
create_entity.summary_section_description: Add descriptive text in one or more languages.
create_entity.aliases_empty: No aliases yet. Add synonyms or translated names if this entity is known by other terms.
create_entity.actions_description: Review the information above, then create the entity or cancel.

edit_entity.title: Edit Entity
edit_entity.description: Update the entity information. The slug is the unique identifier for this entity.

source_metadata.trust_hint: Algorithmic quality score — affects inference weighting

source.delete_confirm_message: Are you sure you want to delete this source? This will also delete all relations associated with it. This action cannot be undone.

create_source.title: Create Source
create_source.description: Create a new source for the knowledge graph. Sources are references that provide the foundation for relations and claims.
create_source.url_help: Link to the source document or webpage
create_source.description_autofill: Paste a URL below and click 'Auto-Fill' to automatically extract metadata from PubMed, arXiv, or any webpage.
create_source.review_below: Review the fields below and make corrections if needed.
create_source.manual_fallback: You can fill the form manually.
create_source.next_step_hint: After creating the source, you can extract knowledge and create relations.
create_source.quality_scoring_header: Quality scoring is based on Oxford CEBM and GRADE standards:

edit_source.title: Edit Source
edit_source.description: Update the source information. Sources provide the foundation for relations and claims.

relation.delete_confirm_message: Are you sure you want to delete this relation? This action cannot be undone.

relations.title: Relations
relations.subtitle: Relations record evidence-backed connections between entities. Each relation is tied to a source document.
relations.browse_explanation: Relations are grounded in sources: every relation must come from a specific document, ensuring traceability. To browse and verify existing relations, navigate to a source and inspect its evidence section.
relations.create_explanation: Use the form to add a single source-grounded relation, or upload a batch file to create multiple relations at once.
relations.view_by_source: Relations are currently organized by source. To view relations, please visit the Sources page and select a source.
relations.explanation: Relations in this system are tied to sources. Each relation must come from a specific source, ensuring traceability and trust.

edit_relation.title: Edit Relation
edit_relation.description: Update the relation details. Note that the source cannot be changed.

global_search.label: Search
global_search.press_enter: Press Enter to search all results

change_password.title: Change Password
change_password.description: Enter your current password and choose a new password. Your new password must be at least 8 characters long.
change_password.password_too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters

settings.title: Settings
settings.email_help: You may need to verify your new email address
settings.invalid_email: Please enter a valid email address
settings.deactivate_warning: Temporarily disable your account without deleting your data. You can reactivate it later by logging in again.
settings.deactivate_confirmation: Are you sure you want to deactivate your account? Your account will be temporarily disabled, but you can reactivate it by logging in again. Your data will be preserved.
settings.delete_warning: Once you delete your account, there is no going back. This action is permanent and will remove all your data.
settings.delete_confirmation: Are you absolutely sure you want to delete your account? This action cannot be undone and all your data will be permanently removed.

home.title: {{brand}}
home.subtitle: Trace claims, assess evidence quality, and surface contradictions
home.description: {{brand}} aggregates evidence from multiple sources and computes confidence across relations. Inspect which sources support or contradict each claim, follow the evidence trail, and understand where agreement breaks down.
home.relationsDesc: Inspect source-grounded claims linking entities. Follow evidence trails from relation to original document.
home.inferencesDesc: Review aggregated evidence per entity. See confidence levels, contradictions, and source quality at a glance.
home.step1Desc: Check the review queue for newly extracted relations. Approve, reject, or flag each claim before it affects inferences.
home.step2Desc: Navigate to any entity's disagreement view to see where sources conflict. Contradictions are preserved — not resolved — so you can assess them directly.
home.step3Desc: Open any inference explanation to see which publications contributed, their confidence weights, and the exact passage or relation each came from.
home.step4Desc: Extend coverage by adding publications via URL, PubMed ID, or bulk import. New sources trigger automatic relation extraction for review.

inferences.title: Computed Inferences
inferences.noEntities: No entities found. Create entities and relations to see computed inferences.

explanation.title: Inference Explanation
explanation.summary_intro: Based on {{count}} source(s), this '{{role}}' shows {{direction}} with {{confidence_level}} confidence ({{pct}}%).
explanation.high_disagreement: High disagreement detected - sources significantly contradict each other
explanation.contradictions_note: The sources below show opposing evidence. Review them carefully to understand the full picture.
explanation.source_evidence_desc: Click on any source to view its full details

filters.title: Filters
filters.no_results: No items match the current filters

reset_password.title: Set New Password
reset_password.subtitle: Enter your new password below.
reset_password.error: Failed to reset password. The link may have expired.
reset_password.success_message: Your password has been successfully reset.

forgot_password.title: Reset Password
forgot_password.subtitle: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgot_password.check_email_message: If an account exists for that email address, you will receive a password reset link shortly.
forgot_password.check_spam: Please check your inbox and spam folder.

review_queue.pending_review_hint: Extractions waiting for a human decision
review_queue.auto_verified_hint: Passed automated quality checks — spot-check for accuracy
review_queue.average_score_hint: Higher scores suggest more reliably extracted items
review_queue.flagged_hint: Items that failed a quality check and need closer attention
review_queue.queue_staged_description: This queue holds staged entity, relation, and claim extractions that need human review before they are materialized into the graph.
review_queue.queue_drafts_description: This queue holds draft entity, relation, and source revisions authored with LLM assistance. Each draft must be confirmed or discarded explicitly.
review_queue.filters_description: Narrow the staged extraction queue by validation score, flagged status, or extraction type.
review_queue.batch_tools_description: Select staged extractions to approve or reject them in one batch.
review_queue.items_description: Review staged extractions item by item, or use the batch tools above after selecting a set.

llm_drafts.no_drafts_desc: All LLM-generated revisions have been reviewed.

batch_relations.max_rows_warning: Maximum of {{max}} relations per batch reached.
batch_relations.error_roles_required: At least one role is required
batch_relations.error_role_fields_required: Each role must have an entity and a role type

extraction_preview.title: Extraction Complete!
extraction_preview.high_confidence_rest: All entities have exact or synonym matches. You can quick-save or review details below.
extraction_preview.review_msg: Review extracted entities and relations before saving to the knowledge graph.
extraction_preview.no_entities_alert: No entities selected. Please select at least one entity to create or link before saving.
extraction_preview.all_validated: All entities validated with high confidence
extraction_preview.review_guidance: Review entities and relations above, then save to add them to the knowledge graph.
extraction_preview.all_skipped: All entities skipped. Adjust decisions above to enable saving.

smart_discovery.results_budget_hint: Number of top-quality sources to pre-select (you can adjust selection later)
smart_discovery.min_quality_hint: Only include sources with quality score above this threshold
smart_discovery.already_imported_notice: {{count}} sources are already in your database (marked with ✓)

resend_verification.title: Resend Verification Email
resend_verification.subtitle: Enter your email address and we'll send you a new verification link.
resend_verification.success_message: A new verification email has been sent to {{email}}.
resend_verification.success_hint: Please check your inbox and spam folder for the verification link.

verify_email.loading_message: Please wait while we verify your email address.
verify_email.success_message: Your email address has been successfully verified.
verify_email.success_hint: You can now log in to your account.
verify_email.error_hint: The verification link may have expired or is invalid.

entityTerms.title: Alternative Names & Aliases
entityTerms.description: Add alternative names, synonyms, or translations to help users find this entity.
entityTerms.noTerms: No alternative names defined. Add terms to improve searchability.
entityTerms.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete the term "{{term}}"?
